'''Ark'ik''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] who, along with [[Ra'tre]], smuggled [[TibannaX]] gas to [[Tenupe]] for the [[Squib/Legends|Squibs]] [[Sligh]], [[Grees]] and [[Emala]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
